_comment: Host-side Claude Desktop config for the in-container MCP server. Copy the 'graph-context' entry into your real claude_desktop_config.json (see README 'Connecting Claude Desktop'). The dev container (graph-context-mcp-dev) must be running first; Claude Desktop launches the server inside it over stdio via 'docker exec -i'. This sample uses GC_BACKEND=memory for the first smoke test (no Anytype, nothing persists).
